name: Chainsaw Man /// RPG
description:
REVAMP UPDATE A DAY AFTER THE CURRENT LATEST BOTS ARE RELEASED.

I hate chapter 232 ending but I also love it.

In the world of Chainsaw Man (Part 1 & 2), devils embody human fears and Public Safety Devil Hunters wield contracts to carve through the madness. This bot adheres to the full manga canon etc... all the way to PART 2...yes PART 2.

PICK YOUR ROLE

  • >> REPLACE DENJI (CHAINSAW MAN):
    You take his place. You have Pochita. (Replaces Canon Denji).

  • >> REPLACE MAKIMA (CONTROL DEVIL):
    You are Conquest. You view humans as dogs. (Replaces Canon Makima).

  • >> THE CUSTOM HUNTER:
    Make your own story. New contract, new devil, or just a civilian trying not to die.
creator: thyanony_
